description_long: This is a tall, ornate stone obelisk mounted on a square pedestal, featuring intricate sculptural elements. The base is flanked by two life-sized statues, each holding objects and standing on either side of a central shield or crest. The shaft of the obelisk is relatively plain, rising vertically to support a dramatic sculptural group at the top, which appears to depict multiple human figures in dynamic poses. The surface of the monument shows signs of weathering, with some moss or lichen growth at the base, suggesting it is situated outdoors. The overall design is highly decorative, with classical influences and detailed ornamentation throughout. The monument is set on a square patch of grass or mossy ground, indicating its placement in a landscaped or park-like urban setting.
description: A tall, decorative stone obelisk with sculpted figures at the top and two statues flanking a shield on its ornate base, set on a mossy square platform. The monument features classical detailing and weathered surfaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the two statues flanking a central shield on the base, with the sculptural group clearly visible at the top.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the plain shaft of the obelisk and the profile of one statue, with the base and mossy ground visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the statues and the sculptural group at the top, with less detail on the base's front-facing ornamentation.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other statue in profile and the plain shaft, with the mossy base extending around the monument.
attribute_ornamentation: Rich ornamentation includes two life-sized statues flanking a central shield or crest on the base, and a dramatic sculptural group of human figures at the top. Decorative reliefs and classical motifs are present around the base.
attribute_base_design: The base is square and robust, featuring a central shield or crest, flanked by two detailed statues. The base sits on a slightly raised platform with visible moss or grass, and includes classical decorative elements and reliefs.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is crowned with a complex sculptural group depicting multiple human figures in dynamic poses, rather than a simple pointed or pyramidal cap.
attribute_surrounding_features: The obelisk is set on a square patch of mossy or grassy ground, with no visible fencing or additional objects immediately adjacent.
